Fotoğraflarla Galata

Social

Our university has set its vision as being a pioneer among higher education institutions by educating students who can follow the changing global, technological and environmental innovations in the world, think independently, contribute to the environment and society, and develop themselves in the fields of social, science and art.

At our university, we attach great importance not only to academic success but also to social life. We encourage you to take an active role in our dynamic campus life and develop yourself in every aspect. We will be happy to see you among us as future leaders and individuals who make a difference.

Contributing to the Personal and Professional Development of Individuals

We maximize the socialization potential of each student with our comprehensive education programs and individual counseling services. We offer all kinds of support for our students to reach their career goals and complete their personal development.

Enhancing Collaboration and Teamwork Skills

Through student clubs, group projects, workshops and social events, we develop our students' collaboration and teamwork skills. In this way, we ensure that our graduates are successful in their professional lives.

Education in line with International Standards and Erasmus

Our university, which offers education at international standards, also provides our students with the opportunity to study and have cultural experiences in different countries of Europe through Erasmus programs. In this way, while our students' foreign language skills improve, they gain knowledge and skills that will provide an advantage in the global competitive environment. The Erasmus program gives our students the opportunity to establish social activities, new friendships and international connections. With this program, our university aims to raise individuals who make a difference in the future.

Fostering Creative Thinking Skills

Within the framework of its vision of social life, our university organizes various seminars, events and competitions to develop our students' innovative and creative thinking skills. In this way, we aim to maximize their problem-solving and innovative thinking skills. By providing our students with an educational environment enriched with social activities, we raise them as creative leaders of the future
